LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO POLICE OFFICERS' ASSOCIATION' PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO FILED A NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR # 8600 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On San Francisco Police Officers Association Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petitioner San Francisco Police Officers' Association' petition to compel arbitration is granted. Respondent City of San Francisco filed a notice of non-opposition. Order signed.
Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR # 8600 =302/hk
